description: Music Experience Enhancements (items 1-10): Song lyrics with synced scrolling (enhance existing LyricsDisplay), album artwork color theming (enhance existing DynamicColorTheme), YouTube video embeds (enhance existing VideoSection/YouTubeEmbed), song preview waveform visualization, crossfade between previews, album tracklist auto-play, artist radio mode, mini lyrics ticker in MiniPlayer, BPM/tempo indicator, and album liner notes design for track pages.
steps: 1. Enhance app/components/LyricsDisplay.tsx: improve the synced scrolling to work with audio playback progress from AudioPlayerContext - map current playback time to estimated lyric line position based on even time distribution across lines. Add a karaoke-style highlight effect.

2. Enhance app/components/DynamicColorTheme.tsx and app/components/DynamicColorProvider.tsx: ensure the page-level color theming applies a full gradient background to track/album/artist pages based on dominant album art colors. Apply to hero sections, cards, and navigation elements.

3. Enhance app/components/YouTubeEmbed.tsx and app/components/VideoSection.tsx: embed YouTube videos using iframe with youtube.com/results?search_query= URL pattern (no API key needed). Show video search results embedded on artist and track pages.

4. Create app/components/player/WaveformVisualizer.tsx: generate a visual waveform display using Web Audio API's AnalyserNode during 30-second preview playback. Show animated bars that respond to audio frequency data. Integrate into AudioPlayer.tsx.

5. Add crossfade to AudioPlayerContext.tsx: when switching songs, create the new Audio object and fade it in while fading out the old one over ~2 seconds using volume ramping. Add a crossfadeEnabled setting.

6. Create app/components/album/AlbumAutoPlay.tsx: add an 'Auto-play all previews' button on album pages that queues all album tracks and plays them sequentially using the existing queue system in AudioPlayerContext.

7. Create app/components/player/ArtistRadio.tsx: when on an artist page or playing an artist's track, offer 'Artist Radio' button that fetches more tracks from the same artist via getArtistTracks() and queues them automatically.
8. Add mini lyrics ticker to app/components/MiniPlayer.tsx: show a single scrolling lyrics line in the mini player bar by fetching lyrics and estimating current line from playback progress.
9. Create app/components/BPMIndicator.tsx: estimate BPM from track genre metadata (map genres to typical BPM ranges) and track duration. Display as a small badge on track cards and detail pages.

10. Create app/components/album/LinerNotes.tsx: redesign track detail page section to look like vinyl liner notes with credits layout, story section (using track metadata), large artwork, track listing with durations in a typewriter font style.
acceptance_criteria: LyricsDisplay shows highlighted current line synced with audio playback
Album art colors theme the track/album page hero sections dynamically
YouTube video embeds appear on track and artist pages without requiring API keys
Waveform visualization animates during audio preview playback
Audio crossfades smoothly when switching between tracks
Album page has auto-play button that queues all tracks
Artist radio mode generates a queue from artist's catalog
Mini player shows current lyric line as a ticker
BPM indicator displays estimated tempo on track cards
Track pages include a liner notes styled section with credits
verification: bun run lint passes with zero errors
bun run build succeeds with zero errors
